title: LIC HFL Junior Assistant Recruitment — 180 Posts, Last Date to Apply is TODAY April 30
author: Ashutosh Khulbe
excerpt: LIC Housing Finance Limited is recruiting 180 Junior Assistants. Online applications close TODAY — April 30, 2026. Graduates with 55%+ marks can apply. Salary Rs 30,000-35,000/month.

related_pages.title: Bank PO vs SSC CGL comparison

body: LIC Housing Finance Limited (LIC HFL) has announced recruitment for 180 Junior Assistant positions across India. The application window opened on April 16 and closes TODAY — April 30, 2026. If you haven't applied yet, do it immediately before the portal shuts down at midnight.

Eligibility: Bachelor's degree in any discipline with minimum 55% aggregate marks. Age limit: 21-28 years as on April 30, 2026 (relaxation as per government norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD). The selection process consists of an online examination followed by a personal interview.

The estimated monthly salary for Junior Assistant at LIC HFL ranges from Rs 30,000 to Rs 35,000 including basic pay, DA, HRA, and other allowances. LIC HFL employees also receive housing loan benefits at concessional rates — a significant perk given LIC HFL's core business is home loans.

LIC HFL is a subsidiary of Life Insurance Corporation of India and is one of India's largest housing finance companies. Working at LIC HFL combines the stability of a government-backed institution with exposure to the real estate finance sector. Career growth leads to roles in credit appraisal, branch management, and corporate lending.

callout.heading: Apply NOW — portal closes tonight
callout.content: Visit lichousing.com → Careers → Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026. Complete registration, fill application form, upload photo and signature, and pay the application fee online. The portal closes at midnight on April 30, 2026. Don't wait — LIC HFL's website often slows down on the last day due to heavy traffic. Apply in the next few hours to be safe.

faqs.question: What is the LIC HFL Junior Assistant selection process?
faqs.answer: Two stages: Online Examination (objective MCQs covering English Language, Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning Ability, General Awareness, and Computer Knowledge) followed by Personal Interview for shortlisted candidates. Final selection is based on combined performance in both stages.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for LIC HFL recruitment?
faqs.answer: General/OBC candidates: Rs 800. SC/ST/PwD candidates: Rs 100. Payment is online only through credit card, debit card, net banking, or UPI. The fee is non-refundable.

faqs.question: Is LIC HFL a government company?
faqs.answer: LIC HFL is a subsidiary of LIC of India (which is a government-owned corporation). While LIC HFL itself is listed on stock exchanges and operates commercially, its LIC parentage provides institutional stability and brand trust. Employees get benefits similar to other LIC group companies.

faqs.question: How to prepare for LIC HFL Junior Assistant exam?
faqs.answer: The exam pattern is similar to IBPS Clerk — practice Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, English, GK, and Computer Knowledge from any banking exam preparation book. Focus on speed and accuracy — the exam has sectional timing. Solve previous year IBPS Clerk and SBI Clerk papers for practice.
